seed.text: The same failing test was rerun again and again without changing code or fixture state, which hid the real cause.
A command was retried on the same broken path without any state change, so the loop produced noise instead of new evidence.

holdout.text: The build step was executed repeatedly even though no config or source input changed, so the same failure kept returning.
An end-to-end scenario was retried with identical inputs after a failure, masking the root problem instead of testing a new fix.
